mi_estimator: discrete plug-in MI (bits) on integer claim/demand clipped to [0,30], Miller–Madow bias correction; SE = bootstrap (B=40, resample pairs)
decoder: held-out by training seed: train seeds ∉ {7,8,9}, test ∈ {7,8,9}; features=[claimed_demand]; targets=true_demand_{t+1} and true_demand_t; LinearRegression + MLPRegressor(64)
conditioning: rows where Signal is not None and claimed_demand is not None; retailers only

verdict.label: babbling
verdict.rationale: Retailer broadcasts carry little next-demand information (MI=0.067 bits vs truthful lag-1 ceiling 0.480; held-out decoder R²=0.067). Share≈0.48 is frequency without content.

thresholds.informative_if: MI/MI_truth≥0.25 & MI≥0.05 bits OR held-out decoder R²≥0.10
